nasb.text: He *found first his own brother Simon and *said to him, “We have found the Messiah” (which translated means Christ).

esv.text: He first found his own brother Simon and said to him, “We have found the Messiah” (which means Christ).

cnv.text: 他先找到自己的哥哥西門，告訴他：“我們遇見彌賽亞了！”

ccb.text: 他首先去找他哥哥西门，说：“我们找到弥赛亚了！”弥赛亚的意思是基督。

csbs.text: 安得烈先去找自己的哥哥西门，对他说：“我们找到了弥赛亚。”——“弥赛亚”翻译出来就是“基督”。
